exhibits.title: Generative AI for Medical Imaging & Breast Cancer Diagnosis
exhibits.description: Designed a Pix2Pix GAN architecture to synthesize Dual-Energy Subtracted (DES) phantoms from low-energy mammograms, facilitating radiation-free screening research. Built a multi-view deep learning framework utilizing 8 CESM views for granular Normal/Benign/Malignant classification, integrating Grad-CAM for visual explainability.

exhibits.title: Car Damage Assessment System
exhibits.description: Developed an end-to-end damage classification system using a custom dataset of 2,300 vehicle images. Optimized model performance from 57% to 80% accuracy by transitioning from EfficientNet-B0 to a ResNet backbone and implemented automated hyperparameter tuning using Optuna.

exhibits.title: AI & ML Academic Profile
exhibits.philosophy: Delivered intensive training in offline settings for undergraduate students, covering Python, ML, DL, and CNNs. Emphasized hands-on coding, practical datasets, and industry workflows.
exhibits.impact: Mentored students for internships, academic projects, and career guidance. Conducted awareness sessions in government schools for non-technical students.

exhibits.title: RAG-Based AI Knowledge Assistant
exhibits.description: Built a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) system using the Gemini API to provide context-aware answers from private documents. Implemented vector search for semantic retrieval and deployed the application on Hugging Face Spaces.
